ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_secret" TEXT /* Secret key for the client */,
  "redirect_uri" TEXT /* Redirect URI for the client */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (user or organization) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the client was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time the client was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the client */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the client's icon */,
  "terms_of_service_url" TEXT /* URL of the client's terms of service */,
  "policy_url" TEXT /* URL of the client's policy */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the client is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (user or organization) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_roles" (
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the client */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auth_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the authentication attempt */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client making the authentication attempt */,
  "auth_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the authentication attempt */,
  "auth_type" TEXT /* Type of authentication (e.g., password, token) */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the authentication attempt was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the authentication attempt */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user making the authentication attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auth_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auth_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client the token was issued to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the token was issued to */,
  "token" TEXT /* The access token itself */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the token expires */,
  "scopes" TEXT /* Scopes of the token (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_tokens_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refresh_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client the token was issued to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the token was issued to */,
  "token" TEXT /* The refresh token itself */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the token expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refresh_tokens_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refresh_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client making the request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the request */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., authorization_code, refresh_token) */,
  "redirect_uri" TEXT /* Redirect URI for the request */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., code, token) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the request (e.g., read, write) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_requests_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client the grant was issued to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the grant was issued to */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., authorization_code, refresh_token) */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the grant expires */,
  "scopes" TEXT /* Scopes of the grant (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_grants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_token_grants_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., user_login, client_create) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client who triggered the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
